heading: PROCESS
intro: Our process is structured and fully managed:

steps.title: Discovery + Vision Alignment
steps.description: We begin by understanding your lifestyle, needs, and vision for the space. This foundational step ensures every design decision is grounded in how you actually live.

steps.title: Concept + Design Development
steps.description: We develop a cohesive design direction—from spatial planning and material palettes to custom details—translating your vision into a fully realized concept.

steps.title: Sourcing + Procurement
steps.description: We source and procure every element—furniture, fixtures, materials, and custom pieces—managing orders and timelines so nothing falls through the cracks.

steps.title: Installation + Styling
steps.description: We oversee every detail of the final installation and add the finishing layers that bring the space to life—transforming it from a design plan into a home.

note: You’re guided through key decisions while we handle the details.
